curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. The patch commit (97d2316) adds a NULL check after the PKCS12_create call in serialize_key_and_certificates_to_pkcs12. Only one non-test source file was changed (src/cryptography/hazmat/backends/openssl/backend.py). Location derived directly from the patch diff. No sibling files exist in the same directory. L1 broadened to cover the full serialization/encoding layer; L3 narrowed to the OpenSSL backend PKCS#12 handling. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed: CWE-476 matches the missing NULL check on the PKCS12_create return value.
